title: Match Word to Image: wrong-answer red X overlay + auto-reset retries

requirements.summary: Match ChooseCorrectImageGame’s incorrect-selection overlay (red translucent + large centered X) on the selected option only in MatchWordToImageGame, then auto-reset after ~800ms to allow unlimited retries.
acceptanceCriteria: In MatchWordToImageGame, when the user selects an incorrect option, only that option renders a full-cover overlay matching ChooseCorrectImageGame’s incorrect state (red translucent overlay + large centered X icon).
The incorrect feedback automatically disappears after ~800ms (same delay as ChooseCorrectImageGame) and the user can immediately try again on the same question without pressing Next.
After an incorrect selection resets, all options return to the idle visual state and are clickable again.
Correct-selection behavior remains unchanged: correct option indicates success and enables proceeding to the next question.

file_operations.description: Update wrong-answer UI/UX to mirror ChooseCorrectImageGame: render an absolute, full-cover red translucent overlay with a large centered XCircle over only the clicked option block (not the full row), and add an ~800ms timeout to clear incorrect state (selectedOption + optionStates) so options become clickable again for unlimited retries; keep correct-selection flow unchanged and ensure any pending timeout is cleaned up on unmount/question change to avoid state updates after navigation.
